en: It is on the dinner menu, only the price changes.
So for lunch menu, the crawfish to toubet is $8.95. How much is it for dinner on the special? $29.95. So it jumps to $20.
ko: 점심 메뉴에서 가재 튀김은 8.95달러예요. 저녁 스페셜은 얼마죠? 29.95달러예요. 그러니까 20달러가 뛰네요.

en: The price jumps 3 and 1 half times
for the special and the dinner, and nothing changes.
ko: 스페셜과 저녁 모두, 그런데 아무것도 변하지 않아요.

en: You don't even throw me an extra couple of tails in there? Shame on you, TJ. Well, not me.
ko: 추가로 꼬리 몇 개도 안 주나요? TJ, 부끄럽네요. 저한테는요.

en: Is that just for the crawfish, or is
that for all the specials? It's pretty standard.
So let's start off with, please, the fine green tomatoes, please. OK. The chicken and sausage gumbo as well, please.
ko: 그럼 먼저, 맛있는 푸른 토마토로 시작할게요. 그리고 치킨 소시지 검보도 주세요.

en: And I've got to go for that steak and lobster rocket.
Very good. Thank you. Wow. Fried green tomatoes.
ko: 아주 좋아요. 감사합니다. 와, 튀긴 푸른 토마토.

en: Fried green. The rest of his order is going in now.
ko: 튀긴 푸른 토마토. 나머지 주문은 지금 들어가요.

en: Hello. Oh, hello. How are you? I'm very well, thank you. How are you? Star, nice to see you. Please, take a seat. Well, welcome.
ko: 안녕하세요. 아, 안녕하세요. 잘 지내세요? 아주 잘 지내요, 감사합니다. 당신은요? 스타, 만나서 반가워요. 앉으세요. 환영합니다.
